requirements.title: WF-001: Make accountable decisions from current evidence
requirements.statement: Present the current evidence, missing information, authority, and viable outcomes before an accountable actor commits the next workflow state. In seasonal planning, dispatch, execution, and verification, this contract applies to observed → planned.
acceptance_criteria: Given a referenced full-season fixture, the interface resolves TRN-WF-001-002 without inventing an unsupported state change.
The actor, authority, record inputs, generated evidence, effective time, and immutable audit consequence remain inspectable before and after the action.
A denied, offline, stale, corrected, or conflicting attempt receives an explicit recovery path and never silently overwrites canonical history.

requirements.title: WF-001: Advance only valid canonical transitions
requirements.statement: Offer only canonical state transitions that are valid from the current state and explain why unavailable actions are denied or require escalation. In seasonal planning, dispatch, execution, and verification, this contract applies to entry → observed and approved → assigned and assigned → acknowledged.
acceptance_criteria: Given a referenced full-season fixture, the interface resolves TRN-WF-001-001 and TRN-WF-001-004 and TRN-WF-001-005 without inventing an unsupported state change.
The actor, authority, record inputs, generated evidence, effective time, and immutable audit consequence remain inspectable before and after the action.
A denied, offline, stale, corrected, or conflicting attempt receives an explicit recovery path and never silently overwrites canonical history.

acceptance_criteria: Given a referenced full-season fixture, the interface resolves TRN-WF-001-001 without inventing an unsupported state change.

A denied, offline, stale, corrected, or conflicting attempt receives an explicit recovery path and never silently overwrites canonical history.

A denied, offline, stale, corrected, or conflicting attempt receives an explicit recovery path and never silently overwrites canonical history.

acceptance_criteria: Given a referenced full-season fixture, the interface resolves TRN-WF-001-008 without inventing an unsupported state change.
The actor, authority, record inputs, generated evidence, effective time, and immutable audit consequence remain inspectable before and after the action.
A denied, offline, stale, corrected, or conflicting attempt receives an explicit recovery path and never silently overwrites canonical history.
